jobPostings.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobPostings.descriptionHtml:
We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Platform team.

What you'll do

  • Design and build scalable backend services
  • Lead technical architecture decisions

Requirements

  • 5+ years of backend development experience
  • Proficiency in Python, Go, or Rust
  • Experience with distributed systems and microservices

Nice to have

  • Experience with Kubernetes
  • Open source contributions
jobPostings.descriptionPlain:
We're looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Platform team.

What you'll do
- Design and build scalable backend services
- Lead technical architecture decisions

Requirements
- 5+ years of backend development experience
- Proficiency in Python, Go, or Rust
- Experience with distributed systems and microservices

Nice to have
- Experience with Kubernetes
- Open source contributions

jobPostings.title: Data Science Intern
jobPostings.descriptionHtml:

Requirements

  • Currently enrolled in a CS or related program
